insights: The market has stabilized significantly after the initial volatility observed at the start of the 30-day period, showing a consistent plateau around the 1340-job mark.
Software Engineering remains the primary driver of volume, while Data Engineering shows signs of stagnation, suggesting a shift in hiring priorities toward core infrastructure and ML applications.

Company tier distribution is remarkably stable, indicating that hiring budgets for new graduates are currently locked in with little aggressive expansion or contraction expected in the immediate term.
